data.title: Argentina President Javier Milei Denies Accusations of Promoting LIBRA Token
data.description:
Argentine President Javier Milei claims he only shared information about the project out of technological enthusiasm.
source: https://coincu.com/322898-president-javier-milei-denies-accusations

data.title: REVOX and Four.meme have reached a strategic cooperation to jointly promote the development of the BNB chain AI proxy ecosystem
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BNB Ecosystem AI Agent Project REVOX and BNB Chain Token Launch Platform Four.meme announced a strategic cooperation to jointly promote the innovative application of AI agent technology in the BNB ecosystem and accelerate the process of Web3 intelligence.
As an important promoter of the BNB ecosystem, Four.meme has successively launched popular projects such as $Broccoli, $TST, $SIREN, and $CaptainBNB, and continues to help the development of the BNB ecosystem.
As a representative project of AI agent and Launchpad tracks in the BNB Chain ecosystem, REVOX is building a decentralized AI agent system to promote the deep integration of AI technology and Web3. Its core products Web3 GPT Lense and decentralized AI Agent platform REVOX Studio have covered multiple scenarios such as smart asset analysis, on-chain AI interaction, and smart transaction execution, and the number of global users has exceeded 21 million.
This cooperation will combine Four.meme's market influence with REVOX's technical advantages in the field of AI to jointly explore more possibilities of AI empowering Web3 and inject new vitality into the BNB ecosystem.

data.title: Uniswap Founder Criticizes Token Distribution Practices
data.description: According to Foresight News, Uniswap founder Hayden Adams has expressed his views on token distribution, stating that executing a fair and well-structured token issuance is not difficult. Adams suggested that if a token distribution is mishandled, it might be intentional.

data.title: Uniswap CEO: It is not difficult to launch a fair token, and failure may be by design
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Uniswap CEO Hayden Adams wrote on X: "It's not hard to do a good/fair token launch. So if the token launch fails, it may be by design."

data.title: A newly created wallet withdrew $7.89 million of SOL from Binance 7 hours ago and almost all of it was pledged
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, 7 hours ago, a newly created wallet withdrew 42,895 SOL worth US$7.89 million from Binance, and then sent another 42,805 SOL for staking.

data.title: AscendEX will list LIBRA (LIBRA)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch LIBRA (LIBRA) at 12:00 on February 18, opening the LIBRA/USDT trading pair, and is now open for deposits.

data.title: Upbit will suspend its deposit and withdrawal services due to Kava network upgrade
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement of Upbit, Kava Network is about to undergo a network upgrade, and KAVA deposit and withdrawal services will be suspended from 18:00 (KST) on Tuesday, February 25, 2025 until the stability of the network upgrade is confirmed.

data.title: Musk: Grok 3 voice mode may be launched in about a week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Musk said that Grok 3 voice mode may be launched in about a week. (Jinshi)

data.title: The DOGE team led by Musk will arrive at the US SEC in the next few days to start work
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The DOGE team led by Musk is expected to arrive at the US SEC in the next few days to conduct an audit. (POLITICO)
Earlier today, it was reported that DOGE will audit the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to investigate its potential waste, fraud and abuse.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum capital inflows fell by more than 30% in the past month
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Chain analyst Ali YuX shared data showing that in the past month, the capital inflow of Bitcoin and Ethereum has dropped by more than 30%, from US$45 billion to US$30 billion.
